docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE:CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENIER, TISHA AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHENIER, TISHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $159.67 FILED BY CHENIER, TISHA AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MEGAN LILES, HUMAN RESOURCES REPRESENTATIVE. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENIER, TISHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TISHA CHENIER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CATIE ZAVALA (REGIONAL LEARNING MANGER). DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S UNDERLINED CLAIM HAS BEEN PAID. CASE SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-10-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CATIE ZAVALA, REGIONAL LEARNING MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.
